response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack/web software engineer with strong experience in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and distributed services, but the resume shows no exposure to SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, deep-learning workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design. The only performance-adjacent work is low-latency web microservices, which is a different domain from silicon-level performance architecture. Educational background (BS in CS) and experience are in software craftsmanship, not hardware engineering at the principal level required for this role.
strengths: Strong polyglot software engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency services
Experience writing high-throughput, low-latency systems in DLang at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Long track record of building testable, well-engineered systems and mentoring others
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC or IP modeling, AI accelerators, or hardware-software co-design
No background in deep neural network training/inference optimization, GPU, SIMD/MIMD architectures
Profile is web/full-stack senior IC rather than a principal hardware performance architect

key_factors.factor: Lack of SoC/AI accelerator hardware experience
No deep-learning workload or GPU performance analysis background
